title: prismatomeris henryi
intro: Prismatomeris henryi is a plant species of the Rubiaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prismatomeris henryi include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Prismatomeris henryi is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used in herbal remedies.
